name: Files
description: File storage for Claude — read, write, list, move and delete files inside one jailed root folder, save images from base64, and mint public share URLs.

settings.label: Root folder
settings.help: Container path every tool is jailed to. Leave blank to use the FILES_DIR env var (default /files). Map a host folder to it in Docker, e.g. /mnt/user/appdata/mcp-files → /files.
